THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 4/10/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 3/24/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 45 DAYS PRIOR TO TRIAL DATE, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. DR. FOX'S AMENDED DECLARATION TO BE PROVIDED TO BERRY & BERRY WITHIN 10 DAYS. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WILL BE HEARD UP TO THE FRIDAY BEFORE TRIAL ON 15 DAYS NOTICE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: DIANE E.
